text:
Medical supplies used by the patient, provider, or other practitioners under 
arrangement on behalf of the agency (other than physicians) are subject to 
consolidated billing and bundled into the HHA 30-day period payment 
rate. Once a patient is discharged from home health and not under a home 
health plan of care, the HHA is not responsible for medical supplies. 

DME, including supplies covered as DME, are paid separately from the 
HH PPS and are excluded from the consolidated billing
